- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - P2P video call website using WebRTC
  - Node.js/Express backend for signaling
  - Vanilla JavaScript frontend
  - Real-time peer-to-peer communication

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Create project structure with server and client directories
  - Initialize package.json files
  - Set up Express server with WebSocket support

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Implement WebRTC signaling on backend
  - Create frontend UI for calls
  - Set up peer connection handling

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No extensions required

- [x] Compile the Project
  - Install dependencies with npm (97 packages installed)

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Set up development server task

- [x] Launch the Project
  - Start the signaling server

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - Create/update README.md with setup instructions
